notes: Paul wore #3 for his six Clippers seasons (2011-12 through 2016-17) after being traded from New Orleans. Post-migration, the team's mid-tenure rebrand ('Los Angeles Clippers' -> 'LA Clippers' around 2015) splits this into two adjacent #3 stints by color era, so end_year is dropped from the assertion (neither stint alone spans 2011-2017). Dropped the end_year assertion accordingly.
